title: The Hidden Cost of Our Clothes

questions.sentence: Fast fashion is a popular term we hear a lot today.
It describes the rapid production of new clothing styles that are sold at very low prices.
However, fast fashion has a significant impact on our planet and its people.
This leads to a massive amount of textile waste ending up in landfills.
As consumers, we have a role to play in addressing these issues.
We can choose to buy fewer clothes, opt for second-hand items, or look for items made by sustainable brands.
